title: glycosmis chlorosperma var. macrorachis
intro: Glycosmis chlorosperma var. macrorachis is a plant species, also known as a variety of Glycosmis chlorosperma, which is a type of shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rutaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Glycosmis chlorosperma var. macrorachis include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
